dataset_or_publication: National, state and territory population, December 2025
relevant_measure: Estimated resident population; annual growth; natural increase; net overseas migration
definitional_limitations: ERP and components are revised over time; stock date differs from financial-year overseas migration release.

relevant_measure: Migrant arrivals; migrant departures; temporary student migrant arrivals; NOM comparison
definitional_limitations: NOM residence concept differs from visa grants, visa stocks and administrative intake categories.

relevant_measure: Employment-to-population ratio; unemployment rate; employment and unemployment counts
definitional_limitations: Seasonally adjusted, trend and original series must not be mixed; total labour market values are not migrant-specific rates.

dataset_or_publication: Australian National Accounts: National Income, Expenditure and Product, March 2026
relevant_measure: GDP quarterly growth and national accounts context
definitional_limitations: GDP and GDP per person are not yet directly modelled; chain-volume/current-price measures require separate treatment.

relevant_measure: Annual CPI inflation and monthly price context
definitional_limitations: Monthly CPI indicator is not the full quarterly CPI basket and should not be frozen indefinitely.
Quarterly completions are volatile; annualising one quarter is a current-path approximation, not a forecast.

relevant_measure: Commonwealth revenue and total expenses estimates
definitional_limitations: Budget values are government forecast estimates, not observed outturns; Commonwealth only.

organisation: Department of Climate Change Energy the Environment and Water
dataset_or_publication: National Greenhouse Gas Inventory Quarterly Update: December 2025
definitional_limitations: Numeric emissions pathway is not yet integrated; environmental pressure remains exploratory.
Useful for relationships and ranges; costs vary by asset class and location.

organisation: Australian Institute of Health and Welfare
dataset_or_publication: Health expenditure / health workforce / aged care reports
relevant_measure: Health demand, expenditure and service-capacity relationship candidates
definitional_limitations: Health and aged-care demand must be segmented by age/status before calibration.
